betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Drive§f

§aHolds up to 10 storage cells in one block.§f

The §bME Drive§f is a block that holds up to §e10 storage cells§f. It connects to the ME network and provides storage from the inserted cells.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Cell slots: §e10§f
§b•§f LED indicators: §9color-coded cell status§f
§b•§f Compatible with all §bStorage Cell§f types (1k, 4k, 16k, 64k, fluid, gas)
§b•§f No channel cost

§6How to Use§f:
§b1.§f Place the Drive on a cable
§b2.§f Insert storage cells into the slots
§b3.§f The cells' contents become accessible network-wide

§6LED Color Meanings§f:
§b•§f Green: cell has content
§b•§f Orange: cell is full
§b•§f Blue: cell is empty
§b•§f Red: cell is partitioned / locked

§6Crafting Recipe§f:
§b•§f §b2× Engineering Processor§f
§b•§f §b2× Fluix Glass Cable§f
§b•§f §b2× Iron Ingot§f

§6Strategic Role§f:
The §bME Drive§f is the §9main storage component§f of any AE2 network. Build multiple drives in a §bstorage room§f for scalability.
